title: Benefits in kind: easement for plug-in hybrid electric vehicles
body: "This measure is a benefit in kind easement for:   employers who provide company cars which are plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (PHEVs) to their employees employees who are provided company cars that are PHEVs by their employers   This change will be effective from 1 January 2025 to 5 April 2028. Transitional arrangements will  apply until the earlier of either:   a change or renewal of the arrangement 5 April 2031   "
